title: SUMMARY: AddressSanitizer: heap-use-after-free (Chromium/asan-mac-release-876501/Chromium.app/Contents/Frameworks/Chromium Framework.framework/Versions/92.0.4491.0/Chromium Framework:x86_64+0x1958102f) in blink::ComputedAccessibleNode::checked()
description_snippet:
UserAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10.15; rv:78.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/78.0

Steps to reproduce the problem:
1. Download file "heap-uaf-in-aom.html"
2. Open Chromium 92.0.4491.0 (Developer Build) (x86_64)
3. Enable Chromium flag: chrome://flags/#enable-experimental-web-platfor
